raw_consumer_statement:
I submitted three billing disputes to Citibank, including dispute XXXX, for items that were defective or misrepresented by the merchant ( XXXX ) XXXX In this specific case, the item was flawed and XXXX return process failed : due to the delicate nature of the item, XXXX wanted me to pay for packaging, despite XXXX instructions that they would handle packaging. I can provide photos of the defective item, and I can provide copies of my email communications with Citi upon request. 

Citi denied the dispute with irrelevant documentation ( such as delivery confirmation and screenshots of the item listing ) and never addressed the actual nature of my complaint. They have not issued

a temporary credit and continue to treat the charge as owed, in violation of the Fair Credit Billing Act. I have asked Citi to : - Reinvestigate the dispute based on the actual facts of the case - Provide a real explanation, including the merchants response to my specific complaint, not canned logs or irrelevant materials - Explain how their denial is supported by the FCBA and applicable law Citi has failed to do any o
f this.
